---
title: "Assignment 11 Approach"
author: "Long Lin"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## Assignment 11 Approach

For assignment 11, I plan on building a personalized recommendation system.  In order to do this, I will explore the different personalized recommendation algorithms in order to determine the one I like best.  I believe the User-to-user collaborative filtering may fit my data set the most since it uses data from other user's selections to determine if users might like a certain movie.  I think an output such as predicted ratings may fit the best with the data set.  I will first check if a current package is available already for my needs but am open to implementing the algorithm from scratch, even if it may be a bit bare-bones.  And finally, to evaluate the performance of my recommender, if I do decide to go with the predicted ratings, I believe using cross-validation will be a solid option.
